raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year> I purchased a brace for our dog through a company called XXXX XXXX XXXX The brace included a hinge support that immobilized my dog and made him unable to walk. I contacted the company and the company was gracious enough to partially refund me the hinge support that was causing trauma for our dog. However after a month of use, the brace is now falling apart. Seams are coming unstitched, brace no longer provides support for our dog, etc.. I attempted to resolve this issue directly with the company to no response. I provided them with photo evidence of the current condition of the brace. When the company became unresponsive, I filed a dispute with Citibank over the charge. After Citibank review of the dispute they filed in favor of the merchant. I find this disappointing. This brace totaled {$240.00} and after just a few months is worthless. Both the company and Citibank should stand behind this faulty product and provide a full refund.
